title: Is there a maximum column width? Trying to resize column to fit long file path
excerpt: There seems to be a max width on the columns. I am planning to share my board via a shareable link with people who do not have Monday.com accounts. Right now the column width will not resize to allow me to show the entir…

posts.author: cp40 (Claire Phillippi)
posts.cookedHtml: There seems to be a max width on the columns. I am planning to share my board via a shareable link with people who do not have Monday.com accounts. Right now the column width will not resize to allow me to show the entire text. I know that the viewer can hover over the cell and the info will pop up, but it would be way more useful for me to be able to widen the whole column to show the entirety of the text. Is there a way to do this?

posts.author: cp40 (Claire Phillippi)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks like changing to a “Long Text” column fixed my issued.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
